title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Manappuram Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Manappuram Finance
jsonLd.description:
Manappuram Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Manappuram Finance:
Manappuram Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manappuram Finance!
